title: elaphoglossum bifurcatum
intro: Elaphoglossum bifurcatum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum bifurcatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Elaphoglossum bifurcatum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
